rules: Use showForm() when the agent needs to collect user input
Use showCardList() when displaying a list of items for the user to browse or select
Use showConfirm() for yes/no decisions before taking irreversible actions
Use showChart() for numerical or statistical data visualization
Use showTable() for structured tabular data
Use showCalendar() when the user needs to pick dates or time slots
Use showDetail() to display a single entity with metadata
Use showProgress() to show step-by-step progress tracking
Use showComparison() for side-by-side item comparison
Use showFileUpload() when the user needs to upload files
Use showMap() to display locations on a map
Use showMedia() for video, audio, or image content
Use showRichText() for formatted markdown content
Always provide a text fallback for non-UI clients
User responses come back as structured JSON with intent and data fields
